modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help with formatting cells in Google Sheets

full_description_text:  
So, I was trying to format some cells in Google Sheets, but I just can't figure it out. I mean, I want to change the way the cells look, but nothing seems to work right. It's really frustrating because I thought it would be easy, but I'm just stuck and need some help with it.
short_description: Need help with formatting cells in Google Sheets
description: So, I was trying to format some cells in Google Sheets, but I just can't figure it out. I mean, I want to change the way the cells look, but nothing seems to work right. It's really frustrating because I thought it would be easy, but I'm just stuck and need some help with it.
